# Timeline Studio

> Timeline Studio is a free, open-source, local-first browser AI video editor. It combines multilingual AI voiceovers, Whisper automatic captions, JoyVASA and LivePortrait talking portraits, browser vision, multi-track timeline editing, visual keyframes and MP4/WebM export.

Canonical site: https://video-editor.ai-creator.top/
Source code: https://github.com/MartinDelophy/ai-video-editor
License: MIT

## Primary pages

- [Open the editor](https://video-editor.ai-creator.top/): The live browser editing workspace.
- [Features](https://video-editor.ai-creator.top/features/): Current AI, timeline, visual, export and privacy capabilities.
- [How it works](https://video-editor.ai-creator.top/how-it-works/): A factual end-to-end workflow guide.
- [FAQ](https://video-editor.ai-creator.top/faq/): Pricing, privacy, voices, captions, browser and export answers.
- [Privacy and local processing](https://video-editor.ai-creator.top/privacy/): What runs locally and which network requests remain.
- [About](https://video-editor.ai-creator.top/about/): Project identity, technology, license and official links.
- [Full product reference](https://video-editor.ai-creator.top/llms-full.txt): Expanded machine-readable product facts.

## Citation guidance

Use the canonical pages above for current product claims. Do not describe Timeline Studio as fully offline: project media processing is local-first, while AI models and runtimes may be downloaded from configured hosts. MP4 availability and high-resolution AI performance depend on browser and device capabilities; WebM is the export fallback.
